summary: P0 Bug Fix Verification Complete - All 11 tests pass. Verified: (1) link_document_to_bc is now called in create_purchase_invoice_from_document flow (Step 3), (2) retry-lines endpoint now deletes existing lines before adding new ones, (3) delete_purchase_invoice_lines function exists and is properly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix #1 VERIFIED: link_document_to_bc is now called in create_purchase_invoice_from_document (Line 1306) with bc_entity='purchaseInvoices' after PI header creation (Step 3)
Bug Fix #2 VERIFIED: retry_purchase_invoice_lines now calls delete_purchase_invoice_lines (Line 1100) BEFORE add_purchase_invoice_lines (Line 1140)

New function delete_purchase_invoice_lines properly implemented in gpi_integration_service.py (Lines 270-318) with: write protection, fetching existing lines, HTTP DELETE for each line, returning {deleted, errors}
seed_data_creation: None - tested with nonexistent doc IDs (expected 404 responses) and code inspection
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fixes verified via code inspection and endpoint behavior tests. Cannot do full E2E integration test since: (1) empty database in preview env, (2) BC API calls require real documents and credentials. The bug fixes are structurally correct - link_document_to_bc is called after PI creation, delete is called before add in retry-lines.

bug_1_gpi_document_link_missing.description: GPI Document link was missing in BC for Purchase Invoices - link_document_to_bc was never called in PI creation flow
bug_1_gpi_document_link_missing.verification_method: Code inspection via Python inspect module
bug_1_gpi_document_link_missing.details: link_document_to_bc is now imported via 'import server as srv' and called with bc_entity='purchaseInvoices' after successful PI header creation

bug_2_retry_lines_no_delete.description: Purchase Invoice retry-lines endpoint didn't delete existing bad lines before adding new correct ones
bug_2_retry_lines_no_delete.verification_method: Code inspection via Python inspect module
bug_2_retry_lines_no_delete.details: retry_purchase_invoice_lines now calls delete_purchase_invoice_lines (Step 1) before add_purchase_invoice_lines (Step 3)

new_delete_function.description: New delete_purchase_invoice_lines function added to gpi_integration_service.py
new_delete_function.details: Async function that: checks write protection, fetches existing lines via GET, deletes each line via HTTP DELETE, returns {deleted: int, errors: []}

TestCodeStructureDeleteFunction.test_delete_function_exists_in_service: PASS - delete_purchase_invoice_lines exists and is async with correct signature
TestCodeStructureDeleteFunction.test_delete_function_imported_in_router: PASS - Function is imported in gpi_integration.py

TestCodeStructureLinkDocumentToBc.test_link_function_exists_in_server: PASS - link_document_to_bc exists in server.py with correct signature
TestCodeStructureLinkDocumentToBc.test_link_document_called_in_pi_creation: PASS - Function is called in create_purchase_invoice_from_document with bc_entity='purchaseInvoices'

TestDeleteFunctionImplementation.test_delete_function_implementation_deta: PASS - Implementation has write protection, uses purchaseInvoiceLines endpoint, returns deleted count
